title: centunculus pumilus
intro: Centunculus pumilus, also known as dwarf cornflower, is a flowering plant native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Centunculus pumilus include soothing digestive issues and relieving respiratory problems, such as coughs and colds. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
